recipe.title: Garlic Shrimp & Couscous Bowl with Roasted Zucchini & Lemon Tahini
ingredients: 1.5 lbs large shrimp, peeled and deveined
steps: Toss zucchini slices with 1 tbsp olive oil, salt, and pepper. Roast on a sheet pan for 15-18 minutes until golden.
Bring 2 cups salted water to boil. Add couscous, reduce heat, cover and simmer 8-10 minutes until tender.
Season shrimp with paprika, salt, pepper, and remaining olive oil.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook shrimp 2-3 minutes per side until pink.
Fluff couscous with a fork. Stir in lemon tahini dressing.
Divide couscous among bowls. Top with roasted zucchini, shrimp, and crumbled feta.
Drizzle with extra tahini dressing and garnish with parsley.
